title: Rosewood Battersea Rope & Rubber Triangle Tug Dog Toy, 13cm x 20cm, Blue - Durable Interactive Toy for Tugging, Chewing, and Playtime with Dogs
features: DURABLE AND MULTI-TEXTURED: Keep your furry friend entertained and engaged with these durable and multi-textured rubber and rope toys.
SATISFY NATURAL CHEWING INSTINCTS: Great for tug, fetch, and interactive games, these toys satisfy natural chewing instincts and help to deter boredom and destructive behaviour.
HEALTHY TEETH & GUMS: The multi-textured surface promotes healthy teeth and gums, and the toys are durable enough to withstand all kinds of play.
GIVE YOUR PET THE BEST PLAY TIME: This high-quality and interactive toy is sure to become a favourite amongst your dog's toy collection.
MULTI-TEXTURED AND ENGAGING: The perfect durable toy with rubber and rope to keep your dog entertained for hours, ideal for a game of fetch!
description: From the manufacturer Battersea was founded in 1860 and since then it has rescued, reunited and re-homed over 3 million dogs and cats, placing animals at the centre of everything they do. Rosewood are thrilled to share this exciting collaboration with this iconic institution, combining charitable goals with quality product development to bring a range to market fit for all dogs and cats. Together, Rosewood and Battersea believe every dog and cat deserve the best. This product range aims to bring joy to the lives of your pets whilst supporting Battersea’s charitable ambitions. Produced under license from Battersea Dogs Home Ltd to go towards supporting the work of Battersea Dog & Cats Home (registered charity no 206394). For all licensed products provided by Rosewood, Rosewood project a minimum donation of £10,000 per annum to Battersea Dogs Home Ltd, which gives all its distributable profits to Battersea Dogs and Cats Home. Rosewood's hero products from the range Rubber Belly Bear Rubber Belly Bear is the perfect toy for dogs who love to cuddle and play! This toy is made up of multiple textures which will satisfy chewing instincts. Rubber Treat Heart Toy The Rubber Heart Treat Toy will keep your dog engaged for hours. Fill with treats and watch your pet paw and nudge to dispense! Tune Chaser Mice 3pc These Tune Chaser Mice are great for keeping cats alert and engaged in play. They are motion activated, making them chirp as your cat pounces and plays. Catnip Pencils 3pc Three fun catnip pencils which are ideal for catching and kicking. Each pencil is approximately 9cm long and filled with high quality catnip.
